idea-plugin.name: Drools Rule Checker
idea-plugin.description:
🔥 Drools Rule Checker - Full Language Support for Drools Rules

A comprehensive language support plugin for Drools Rule Language (.drl) files in IntelliJ IDEA. Built on a proper Grammar-Kit BNF parser with typed PSI elements, delivering the same level of intelligent assistance you expect from IntelliJ's native Java support.

✨ Key Features

  • 🎨 Advanced Syntax Highlighting - Beautiful color coding for keywords, strings, numbers, comments, operators, and punctuation
  • 🧠 Grammar-Based Parser - Full AST with error recovery for all DRL constructs (rules, patterns, constraints, imports, globals, functions, declares, queries)
  • 🔍 Real-time PSI-Based Validation:
    • Rule structure validation (missing when/then/end, incorrect clause order)
    • Rule attribute validation (numeric salience, date formats)
    • Duplicate rule name detection
    • Unresolved class references in fact patterns and globals
    • Unbalanced parentheses and missing operators in constraints
    • Unused binding variable warnings
    • Java syntax errors in then-clauses (missing semicolons, unbalanced braces)
    • Import validation (unresolvable, duplicate, unused imports)
  • 💡 Context-Aware Completion:
    • Top-level keywords (package, import, global, rule, function, declare, query)
    • Rule attributes (salience, no-loop, agenda-group, etc.)
    • When-clause keywords (and, or, not, exists, forall, from, accumulate, eval)
    • Then-clause functions (insert, update, modify, retract, delete, drools.halt)
    • Class names from project classpath with auto-import
    • Method and field completion after dot (getters, setters, bean properties)
    • Data types (primitives, wrappers, project classes)
  • 🔗 Go-To-Definition - Ctrl+Click navigation to Java classes, methods, and binding variable declarations
  • 📐 Structure View - Outline panel listing all rules, queries, functions, and declarations
  • 🔧 Quick Fixes - Add missing import, remove unused import, rename duplicate rule, add semicolon, remove unused binding
  • 📁 Code Folding - Collapse rules, import groups, declares, queries, functions, and multi-line comments
  • 🔲 Bracket Matching - Automatic matching for (), {}, []
  • 💬 Comment Support - Toggle line comments (//) and block comments (/* */)
  • 🎨 Customizable Colors - Personalize syntax highlighting in IDE settings

🚀 Perfect For

  • Business Rules Developers
  • Java Developers working with Drools
  • Decision Management Teams
  • Anyone writing .drl files

📋 Supported Drools Constructs

  • Package declarations and import statements
  • Rule definitions with all attributes (salience, no-loop, agenda-group, ruleflow-group, etc.)
  • When-clause patterns with fact types, binding variables, and constraints
  • Conditional elements (not, exists, forall, from, collect, accumulate, eval)
  • Then-clause Java/MVEL action code
  • Global declarations
  • Function definitions
  • Type declarations (declare blocks)
  • Query definitions

🔧 Installation

  1. Go to File → Settings → Plugins
  2. Search for "Drools Rule Checker"
  3. Click Install and restart IntelliJ IDEA
  4. Open any .drl file and enjoy full language support!

💻 Example Rule with Full Support

rule "Customer Discount"
    salience 100
    when
        $customer : Customer(age > 18, status == "ACTIVE")
        $order : Order(total > 1000.00) from $customer.orders
    then
        $order.setDiscount(0.15);
        update($order);
        System.out.println("Discount applied!");
end

The plugin provides full parsing, validation, completion, navigation, and quick fixes as you type.

🐛 Bug Reports & Feature Requests

Found an issue or have a suggestion? Please report it on our GitHub Issues page.

⭐ Support the Project

If this plugin helps your development workflow, please consider:

  • ⭐ Starring the project on GitHub
  • 📝 Writing a review on the JetBrains Marketplace
  • 🐛 Reporting bugs or suggesting features

Made with ❤️ for the Drools community
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 2.1.0 - Language Support Fixes

  • 🔧 Fixed Dot Completion on $-Bindings - Completion now works correctly after $-prefixed binding variables (e.g. $alloyDbBackup.) in then-clauses and constraint expressions
  • 🔧 Fixed Chained Dot-Access - Multi-level property access completion (e.g. $customer.address.city) now resolves each segment iteratively
  • 🆕 Unterminated String Detection - The annotator now flags unterminated string literals with a clear error annotation
  • 🔧 Fixed Class Name Navigation - Ctrl+Click on class names in fact patterns and global declarations now correctly navigates to the Java class
  • 🔧 Fixed Method Navigation on $-Bindings - Ctrl+Click on method names in $-binding dot access (e.g. $alloyDbBackup.getResourceId()) now navigates to the PsiMethod
  • 🏗️ DotAccessExpressionResolver - New shared utility that reconstructs $-prefixed expressions across DOLLAR/IDENTIFIER/DOT leaves, used by both completion and reference providers
  • ⚡ Tightened Reference Registration - Class references now register only on leaf-level IDENTIFIER elements for precise navigation

Version 2.0.0 - Full Language Support (Major Rewrite)

  • 🧠 Grammar-Kit BNF Parser - Complete rewrite from regex-based to a proper recursive-descent parser with full AST and error recovery
  • ⚡ JFlex Lexer - Generated lexer replacing hand-written regex tokenization for reliable keyword/operator/string handling
  • 🌳 Typed PSI Elements - Rich PSI tree with typed nodes for all DRL constructs enabling structural queries
  • 💡 Context-Aware Completion - 7 specialized providers: keywords, attributes, when-clause, then-clause, class names, methods/fields, data types
  • 📦 Auto-Import - Automatically inserts import statements when selecting classes from completion
  • 🔗 Go-To-Definition - Ctrl+Click navigation to Java classes, methods, and binding variable declarations
  • 📐 Structure View - Outline panel listing all rules, queries, functions, and declarations for quick navigation
  • 🔧 Quick Fixes - Add missing import, remove unused import, rename duplicate rule, add semicolon, remove unused binding
  • 🔍 PSI-Based Validation - Comprehensive error detection: rule structure, attributes, duplicates, class resolution, constraints, bindings, Java syntax, imports
  • 📁 PSI-Based Folding - Fold rules, import groups, declares, queries, functions, and multi-line comments
  • 🔲 Bracket Matching - Automatic matching for (), {}, []
  • 💬 Comment/Uncomment - Toggle line comments (//) and block comments (/* */)
  • 🚀 Resolution Cache - Fast class and binding variable lookups with automatic invalidation

Version 1.0.11 - Import Validation & Missing Dependencies

  • 🆕 Import Statement Validation - Real-time validation of import statements syntax
  • 🆕 Missing Import Detection - Detects and highlights unresolved class references
  • 🆕 Smart Class Resolution - Automatically recognizes java.lang classes (no import needed)
  • 🆕 Import Syntax Checking - Validates import path format and missing semicolons
  • 🔍 Enhanced Error Messages - Clear "Cannot resolve symbol" messages like in Java IDEs
  • ⚡ Intelligent Filtering - Excludes Drools keywords and common words from class validation

Version 1.0.10 - Enhanced Syntax Validation

  • 🆕 Advanced Bracket Matching - Real-time validation of parentheses, braces, and brackets
  • 🆕 Java Code Block Validation - Missing semicolon detection in 'then' clauses
  • 🆕 Enhanced String Validation - Unclosed quotes and invalid escape sequence detection
  • 🆕 Field Access Validation - Validates $variable.field patterns
  • 🆕 Function Call Validation - Ensures proper function call syntax
  • 🆕 Constraint Expression Validation - Validates comparison operators and expressions
  • 🎨 Enhanced Syntax Highlighting - Better color coding for punctuation and brackets
  • ⚡ Performance Improvements - Faster real-time validation

Version 1.0.9 - Foundation Release

  • ✅ Basic syntax highlighting for .drl files
  • ✅ Rule structure validation (rule → when → then → end)
  • ✅ Common typo detection
  • ✅ Auto-completion for keywords and functions
  • ✅ Code folding support
  • ✅ Customizable color settings
